reasoning: Your current limiter is a higher-than-normal decline from 5-minute to 20-minute power, indicating poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. After an extended rest, we’ll safely reintroduce intensity with targeted intervals. By focusing on structured over-under workouts on familiar terrain like Emigration Canyon, we’ll gradually enhance your ability to maintain power during sustained climbs like those on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3x10-minute over-under intervals: 2 minutes at 201W, 3 minutes at 245W, repeat; recover for 5 minutes at 209W between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
